notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for canada. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: 中国护照加拿大旅游签证建议
chunks.content: 中国护照持有人短期赴加拿大旅游、探亲访友或普通商务访问时，VIZA AI 应优先考虑 Canada visitor visa / Temporary Resident Visa (TRV) 路线，而不是 eTA。先确认国籍、居住地、旅行目的、停留天数、是否探亲、是否有美国签证/加拿大旧签证等背景；如果是学习、工作、移民或长期陪读，应转向对应 permit/visa。

chunks.title: Canada TRV definition and entry decision
chunks.content: IRCC states that a visitor visa, also called a temporary resident visa, is an official document placed in the passport showing the traveller meets requirements to travel to Canada. It does not by itself guarantee entry; border officers make the final entry decision and decide the allowed period of stay. Most visitors are allowed to stay for up to 6 months unless a different date is indicated.

chunks.title: Canada visitor visa online application and biometrics
chunks.content: IRCC directs visitor visa applicants to apply online through the IRCC Portal, provide passport/travel document copies and supporting documents, pay fees, and give biometrics if required. China is listed among passports that generally need a visitor visa. Applicants outside Canada may need to attend a visa application centre for biometrics and passport submission depending on instructions.

documents.title: Canada Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Canada application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Apply online through the IRCC visitor visa flow unless a paper exception applies. Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/visit-canada/apply-visitor-visa.html ; https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/visit-canada/visitor-visa.html. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Canada fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: Canada visitor visa intake should collect identity, passport/travel document, country of residence, travel purpose and dates, family information, employment or study, funds and payer, travel history, previous refusals/immigration history, invitation or host details if any, and biometrics status.

chunks.title: Canada supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: Documents commonly include passport copy, photo, purpose-of-travel evidence, proof of funds, itinerary or tickets if available, employment/study/home ties, family information form when required, invitation letter and host proof if visiting someone, and translations for non-English/French documents. Workflow guardrails: After submission, applicants may receive a biometric instruction letter and must give biometrics within the official deadline unless exempt. VIZA should track biometrics, passport request, and final decision as separate process steps.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.
